calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause And For An Order Compelling Compliance With Investigative Subpoena
Off Calendar Sep-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause And For An Order Compelling Compliance With Investigative Subpoena is off calendar because the parties settled the case. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Order To Show Cause And For An Order Compelling Compliance With Investigative Subpoena
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Continued To Sep-21-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause And For An Order Compelling Compliance With Investigative Subpoena is Continued on court's own motion to September 21, 2012. The parties must inform Department 302 whether they have resolved the attorney's fees and costs issue no later than 4:00pm on September 14, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
